narrative_constraints.statement: Ground floors of buildings facing the street should be activated with publicly-oriented uses (as depicted in the visualisation with retail/café frontages at street level).

reasons: This page contains only a visualisation render with no text beyond the page number. The active plinth inference is based on the visual content of the render, not a written rule. Confidence is low; rule likely stated elsewhere in the document.

programme_hints: Visualisation shows mixed-use development with active ground-floor commercial/retail uses and residential above, varying building heights from approximately 5 to 12 storeys, with a taller accent tower element in the background.
urban_intent_passages: Architectural visualisation showing a mixed-use urban street scene for Nieuw Legmeer: mid-rise residential buildings (approximately 5-12 storeys) with active ground-floor plinths, brick facades with balconies and green vegetation, tree-lined street with cyclists and pedestrians, and a taller accent tower in the background.
